question:
Fill in the blank with the missing number:

Roman the Tavernmaster has $20 worth of gold coins. He sells 3 gold coins to Dorothy. After she pays him, he has $_______. How many gold coins does Roman have left?
response: $20. Roman still has $20 because we don't know how much Dorothy paid him or the value of each gold coin. Also, the question doesn't say he spent any money, just that he sold coins. So I think the amount stays the same.
